name: Chili Con Queso Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave the butter on high for 30 seconds.
2. Add the cumin, chopped green chilies, chopped onions, shredded jack cheese, minced garlic, cream cheese, and pepper. Stir to combine.
3. Cover with plastic wrap, leaving a vent, and microwave on high for 2 minutes.
4. Add the canned chopped tomatoes and cook for another 2 minutes.
5. Stir in the remaining cheese and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add the cilantro and stir again for 1 minute.
7. Serve with tortilla chips. Makes 2-1/2 cups, with 35 calories per tablespoon.
